name: telegram
description: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.title: Bot Token
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Bot token from @BotFather — format is 123456789:AAH... Stored in keychain (macOS) or ~/.claude/.credentials.json with 0600 permissions elsewhere. Never written to settings.json.
